nasb.text: Then Aaron said to Moses, “Oh, my lord, I beg you, do not account this sin to us, in which we have acted foolishly and in which we have sinned.

esv.text: And Aaron said to Moses, “Oh, my lord, do not punish us because we have done foolishly and have sinned.

cnv.text: 亞倫就對摩西說：“我主啊，求你不要因我們行事愚昧所犯的罪，就把這罪加在我們身上。

ccb.text: 便对摩西说：“我主啊，求你不要因我们愚昧犯罪而惩罚我们。
